_meta.purpose: Data enrichment request for the Gload surname line (Colin's paternal side)
instructions_for_enricher: This file contains all known data for the Gload paternal line.
The Gload line is currently VERY sparse — Colin's father is Frederick Anthony 'Ted' Gload.
We need to trace the Gload surname back as far as possible.
Research sources: FamilySearch.org, FindAGrave.com, Ancestry hints, newspapers.com, census records, vital records.
For each person you find or update, ADD a source entry to 'sources_to_add' with type and citation.
Do NOT fabricate data. If uncertain, use the 'confidence' field: 'high', 'medium', 'low', or 'speculative'.
Living people should NOT be deeply researched for privacy — only add publicly available info.
When done, return this entire JSON file with your additions filled in.
ADD NEW PEOPLE to the 'new_people_found' array using the same format as existing entries.
geographic_focus: Maryland (Prince Georges County, Calvert County, College Park)
key_questions: Where does the Gload surname originate? German? English? Dutch?
What is Ted Gload's full lineage — parents, grandparents, great-grandparents?
Are there Gload concentrations in specific US regions?
Any immigration records for the first Gload in America?
What is Ted Gload's mother's maiden name / maternal line?
